import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useCart } from '../contexts/CartContext'; import GlassCard from '../components/GlassCard'; /** * Shopping cart page with cart functionality * Implements Requirements 4.3, 4.4, 4.5, 4.6 */ const Shop = () => { const { items, total, itemCount, isEmpty, updateQuantity, removeFromCart, clearCart } = useCart(); const handleQuantityChange = (productId, newQuantity) => { if (newQuantity <= 0) { removeFromCart(productId); } else { updateQuantity(productId, newQuantity); } }; if (isEmpty) { return (

Shopping Cart

Your cart is empty

Continue Shopping
); } return (
{/* Cart Items */}

Shopping Cart ({itemCount} items)

{items.map((item) => (
{/* Product Image Placeholder */}
IMG
{/* Product Details */}

{item.name}

${item.price.toFixed(2)} each

{/* Quantity Controls */}
{item.quantity}
{/* Item Total */}

${(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}

{/* Remove Button */}
))}
{/* Order Summary */}

Order Summary

Subtotal ({itemCount} items) ${total.toFixed(2)}
Shipping Free
Tax Calculated at checkout
Total ${total.toFixed(2)}
Continue Shopping
{/* Demo Add Items */}

Demo: Add test items
); }; export default Shop;
